notes: Common PDU format (RT/RO/LLID/IP). Required if Dynamic Registration supported. SU sends on entry to packet data operational mode.
Disconnect format — no IP address field. Sent unconfirmed at de-registration.
Common PDU format. FNE assigns IP address and confirms Scan Mode negotiation.
Common PDU format. SU returns to Closed state on receipt.
Empty CAI Unconfirmed Data Packet Header Block with NO data blocks. Signals pending outbound data to a scanning SU.
Sent when SU cannot decrypt a received encrypted CAI data packet. Carries KEY_ID / ALG_ID / CI / EC.
